# Nouvo — Full Site Reference

> Nouvo is a boutique digital agency based in Athens, Greece. We design and implement digital systems that deliver measurable results. Our work spans website development, e-commerce, SEO, digital marketing, AI automation, and IT infrastructure.
>
> We do not present impressions. We present outcomes.
>
> Tagline: Beyond Digital. Pure Strategy.
> Domain: https://nouvo.agency
> Languages: Greek (default, /) and English (/en/)
> Founded: 20+ years of combined experience | 120+ businesses served

---

## About Nouvo

Nouvo was built to solve a recurring problem: strategy that exists on paper and execution that never follows. Consultants who design and disappear. Teams running tools with no architecture behind them.

We operate as the connective link between business decision and implementation. We translate strategy into systems. We install only what creates real value.

We work with established Greek businesses and international clients who want a strategic partner — not a vendor that disappears after delivery. We do not take on every project. We do not work with templates. Every engagement is tailored.

What we refuse: vanity metrics, generic recommendations, work that cannot be measured, and projects where we cannot guarantee quality.

---

## Services

### Websites & Digital Presence
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/ypiresies/kataskevi-istoselidon

Custom website design and development using Next.js, WordPress, and WooCommerce. Every project is built from scratch — no page builders, no generic templates. Performance, accessibility, and SEO are built in from day one.

Sub-services:
- E-shop / E-commerce (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/eshop): Full WooCommerce and custom e-shop development. Product architecture, payment integration, performance optimization.
- Corporate Website (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/corporate-website): Professional corporate presence. Clear messaging, lead generation, built for conversion.
- Landing Page (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/landing-page): High-converting single-focus pages for campaigns and product launches.
- Portfolio Website (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/portfolio-website): Visual portfolio sites for creative professionals and studios.
- Booking Website (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/booking-website): Appointment and reservation systems for service businesses.
- Website Redesign (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/websites-digital-presence/website-redesign): Full redesign of existing websites — design, structure, performance, and SEO migration.

---

### Search & Visibility
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/ypiresies/anazitisi-oratotita

Organic visibility strategy covering traditional SEO, AI-powered search, and hybrid approaches. We build visibility that lasts.

Sub-services:
- SEO (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/seo-search-engine-optimization): Full SEO strategy and implementation. Keyword research, on-page optimization, content structure, link building.
- Local SEO (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/local-seo): Google Business Profile optimization, local citations, map pack rankings for Greek businesses.
- Technical SEO (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/technical-seo): Core Web Vitals, crawlability, indexation, structured data, site architecture.
- AEO — Answer Engine Optimization (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/aeo-answer-engine-optimization): Optimization for AI Overviews, featured snippets, and voice search. Structure content so AI systems cite your business.
- GEO — Generative Engine Optimization (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/geo-generative-engine-optimization): Optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other LLM-based search engines. llms.txt, citability signals, brand mention strategy.
- HEO — Hybrid Engine Optimization (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/search-visibility/heo-hybrid-engine-optimization): Integrated strategy across traditional search engines and AI-powered discovery platforms.

---

### Marketing & Digital Growth
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/ypiresies/marketing-psifiaki-anaptyxi

Paid media and content strategy with measurable ROAS targets. No vanity metrics — only campaigns that produce revenue.

Sub-services:
- Google Ads (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth/google-ads): Search, Performance Max, Shopping campaigns. Keyword architecture, bid strategy, conversion tracking.
- Meta Ads (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth/meta-ads): Facebook and Instagram advertising. Funnel strategy, creative direction, audience targeting.
- TikTok Ads (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth/tiktok-ads): TikTok campaign management for brands targeting younger demographics.
- Email Marketing (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth/email-marketing): Automated sequences, newsletter strategy, Mailchimp / MailerLite / HubSpot implementation.
- Content Strategy (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/marketing-digital-growth/content-strategy): Editorial planning, SEO-driven content production, content architecture for authority building.

---

### Digital Transformation & AI
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/ypiresies/psifiakos-metasximatismos-ai

AI implementation and process automation for businesses ready to scale operations without adding headcount.

Sub-services:
- Process Automation (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai/process-automation): Workflow automation using Zapier, Make.com, n8n. Eliminate repetitive manual work.
- AI Tools Implementation (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai/ai-tools): Selection, configuration, and integration of AI tools (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini) into business workflows.
- Business Digitization (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai/business-digitization): End-to-end digitization of business operations — documents, communication, reporting.
- AI Chatbots & Assistants (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai/ai-chatbots): Custom AI assistants for customer service, lead qualification, internal knowledge bases.
- Marketing Automation (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/digital-transformation-ai/marketing-automation): Automated marketing funnels, lead nurturing, CRM integration.

---

### IT Support & Maintenance
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/services/it-support-maintenance
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/ypiresies/it-support-sintirisi

Ongoing technical infrastructure management for businesses that want zero downtime and zero surprises.

Sub-services:
- Website Maintenance (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/it-support-maintenance/website-maintenance): Updates, security patches, backups, performance monitoring.
- Technical Support (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/it-support-maintenance/technical-support): On-demand IT support for businesses without internal technical staff.
- Cloud & Hosting (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/it-support-maintenance/cloud-hosting): Cloud infrastructure setup, migration, and management (Vercel, AWS, Google Cloud).
- Domain & Email Management (https://nouvo.agency/en/services/it-support-maintenance/domain-email-management): Domain registration, DNS management, professional email setup (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365).

## Case Studies
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/case-studies
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/case-studies

Real results from website, e-shop, SEO, and digital marketing projects. Each case study documents the business challenge, the decisions made, the implementation, and the measurable outcomes. No marketing copy — only verified results.

## Blog
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/blog
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/blog

Articles on digital strategy, SEO, AI, website development, and marketing. Published in both Greek and English. Categories: Websites & E-shop, SEO & Visibility, Marketing, AI & Automation, IT & Security.

## Contact
URL (EN): https://nouvo.agency/en/contact
URL (GR): https://nouvo.agency/epikoinonia

Every engagement starts with a no-commitment assessment. We evaluate the project, define the scope, and provide a clear proposal before any commitment.

---

## Technical Stack

Built with: Next.js (App Router), Payload CMS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, TypeScript
Hosted on: Vercel
Database: PostgreSQL (Neon)
Fonts: All local — Snaga Unicase Display, Sofia Pro, PF Marlet Display
Performance: Core Web Vitals optimized, SSR + ISR, zero external font requests

---

## Greek Language Reference

The site is primarily in Greek at the root domain (https://nouvo.agency/). English content is available under the /en/ path. Greek URLs use romanized (greeklish) slugs, e.g.:
- /ypiresies = Services
- /epikoinonia = Contact
- /sxetika-me-emas = About
- /kataskevi-istoselidon = Website Development
- /anazitisi-oratotita = Search & Visibility

Greek business terminology used on this site:
- ψηφιακή στρατηγική = digital strategy
- κατασκευή ιστοσελίδων = website development
- ψηφιακός μετασχηματισμός = digital transformation
- αυτοματισμός = automation
- τοπικό SEO = local SEO
